calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-20-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forester, CSR #13286.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff HSBC Bank Nevada, N.A.
Howard Losen, Esq. appearend with defendant Estela C. Washington, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 18, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 30, 2009.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Ms. McDonald. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, Judgment shall issue for plaintiff HSBC Bank Nevada, N.A., and against defendant Estela C. Washington in the amount of $6,781.91. Entry of Judgment is stayed provided defendant Estela C. Washington makes monthly payments as follows: Commencing May 1, 2009, and continuing on the first day of each month thereafter, defendant Estela C. Washington shall make monthly payments to plaintiff HSBC Bank Nevada, N.A. in the amount of $150.00 until the balance is paid in full. Interest shall accrue at a rate of 10% per annum.

If defendant Estela C. Washington fails to make any monthly payment, she (defendant) shall have ten (10) days in which to cure the default. If defendant Estela C. Washington fails to cure said default, plaintiff HSBC Bank Nevada, N.A. may immediately execute on the judgment. Terms of this Agreement shall be reduced to writing by Ms. McDonald. Defendant Estela C. Washington shall return the signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment to Ms. McDonald no later than April 24, 2009.

Defendant Estela C. Washington was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and her understangding of this Agreement.

Matter is continued to May 4, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 206 for Settlement Protective Date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Set For Trial On Mar-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
